subcodes.first_line: O servants of the Most Glorious Beauty and handmaidens of the All-Merciful! His honour, the pilgrim to the Sacred Shrine, Áqá Muhammad Taḥammul [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بندگان جمال ابهی و اماء رحمان حضرت زائر بقعه مبارکه جناب آقا محمد تحمل
subcodes.subjects: @prayers (general or uncategorized), @praise and encouragement, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @martyrs and martyrdom, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness
